title: selaginella societatis
intro: Selaginella societatis, also known as the Society Spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella societatis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Selaginella societatis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
